title: Banilla Claws [Neoforge]
description: Vanilla Claws, But For Neoforge! Vanilla Claws Aims To Add Vanilla-Style Claws To The Game!
body:
This is the forge port of a mod created by PinkGoosik and theoness1, the fabric version can be found [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/banilla-claws) **In Minecraft 1.21, this mod is moving over to Neoforge and will become incompatible with Forge.** A mod that adds vanilla-styled claws! **You can plow the ground**


**Shield cannot be used with claws**


**You can quickly break leaves**


**Different claws and mod support! (showcase is for the fabric version, this port adds support for the Gobber2 mod, however)**


**Also, claws have high attack speed and damage, but a small attack range.**




All of the assets included in this mod are the original Fabric ones, which are licensed under the MIT License.
